channel.title: Beat the Scam
channel.description: Plain-English guides to help people spot online scams before money or data is lost.

item.title: Is This Website a Scam? A Practical Checklist Before You Buy
item.description: A plain-English checklist for judging whether a website is legitimate before you enter payment details.

item.title: Royal Mail Text Scam Guide: How to Spot the Common Delivery Message Trap
item.description: How fake parcel delivery texts work, what signs to check, and what to do if you clicked the link.

item.title: PayPal Email Scam Signs: How to Check a Message Without Panicking
item.description: A checklist for reviewing suspicious PayPal emails and deciding whether a message is genuine.

item.title: Bank Transfer Scam Warning Signs Before You Send Money
item.description: How to assess pressure tactics, fake invoices, account changes, and impersonation before a transfer.

item.title: Crypto Investment Scam Checklist: What to Check Before You Send Funds
item.description: A practical pre-send checklist for crypto investment offers, recovery rooms, and fake trading platforms.

item.title: Phone Call Scam Red Flags: What to Do When a Caller Sounds Convincing
item.description: How to handle urgent, persuasive calls that claim to be from your bank, HMRC, police, or a delivery firm.

item.title: Facebook Marketplace Scam Signs for Buyers and Sellers
item.description: Common payment, courier, and account-verification tricks used on online marketplaces.

item.title: Romance Scam Slow-Burn Patterns: The Emotional Signs People Miss
item.description: How long-form trust building works in romance scams and why the request for money often comes later.

item.title: Job Scam Checklist for UK Applicants
item.description: What to check before responding to remote-work offers, recruiter messages, and paid-task schemes.

item.title: Google Voice Verification Scam: Why Someone Wants Your Code
item.description: How verification-code scams work and why you should never share one-time codes with strangers.
